case_title: MEHTA,RAHUL VS MEHTA,MINESH IND.& CEO OF PARK EXPRESS A CA CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,150.00 FILED BY MEHTA,RAHUL AS TO DEFENDANT MEHTA,MINESH IND.& CEO OF PARK EXPRESS A CA CORP. MEHTA,MINESH IND&DBA AS VIP PARKING COMPANY MEHTA,PRASHANT IND & DBA VIP PARKING COMPANY MEHTA,LIZA M.INDIVIDUALLY CAR PARK BAY AREA/MEHTA PARKING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEHTA,MINESH IND.& CEO OF PARK EXPRESS A CA CORP.
INVALID SERVICE ON LIZA M. MEHTA NOT A PARTY OF OF THE ACTION
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEHTA,LIZA M.INDIVIDUALLY
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAR PARK BAY AREA/MEHTA PARKING CO.
UNTIMELY SERVICE ON LIZA M. MEHTA NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR TO HRG ON SUBSERVED OUT OF COUNTY
UNTIMELY SERVICE ON CAR PARK BAY AREA/MEHTA PARKING CO. NOT SERVED 25 DAY PRIOR TO HRG ON SUBSERVED OUT OF COUNTY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEHTA,RAHUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEHTA,MINESH IND.& CEO OF PARK EXPRESS A CA CORP. $1,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,189.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MEHTA,MINESH IND.& CEO OF PARK EXPRESS A CA CORP. HEARING SET FOR MAY-23-1994 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: APR-14-1994 AS TO DEFENDANT MEHTA,MINESH IND.& CEO OF PARK EXPRESS A CA CORP.
CIVIL SUBPOENA SERVED TO MINESH MEHTA IND/CEO OF PARK EXPRESS, A CORP.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $63.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MEHTA,MINESH IND.& CEO OF PARK EXPRESS A CA CORP.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAY-23-1994, CONTINUED FROM MAY-23-1994 TO JUN-13-1994 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06 AS TO DEFENDANT MEHTA,MINESH IND.& CEO OF PARK EXPRESS A CA CORP.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUN-13-1994, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT MEHTA,MINESH IND.& CEO OF PARK EXPRESS A CA CORP.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MEHTA,MINESH IND.& CEO OF PARK EXPRESS A CA CORP.
